contamination_rules.techno_into_jazz: Replace drums with 909-kick, keep saxophone in Phrygian
contamination_rules.metal_into_ambient: Apply ultra-reverb to distorted guitars, remove transients
contamination_rules.psy_into_gothic: Use 170 BPM rolling bass, but use pipe-organ as Lead
contamination_rules.minimal_into_fractal: Keep silence gaps, but fill them with recursive granular noise

genre_contamination_protocol.synergy_check: Final track must be unclassifiable by standard tags.
